_doc: Live Gradle wrapper pins per Expo SDK. local-expo-build fetches this on every build (3s timeout, silent fallback to the bundled table in src/core/pinGradle.ts). Edit + commit to ship a pin change without an npm release.
_semantics: string value = pin Gradle to that version. null = explicit 'no pin needed' (overrides the bundled table; use to roll back a bundled pin). Omitted SDK = defer to the bundled table.

_notes.55: Pinned to 8.13 — Gradle 9.0.0 (Expo SDK 55 default) breaks expo-manifests with 'SoftwareComponent with name release not found'.
